name: OWASP_A07_Brute_Force_Detection
search: index="web_logs" method="POST" ("*login*" OR "*signin*" OR "*wp-login*" OR "*auth*") | stats count as login_attempts, values(uri) as login_pages, latest(_time) as last_seen by clientip | where login_attempts > 5 | iplocation clientip | fillnull value="Unknown" Country, City | eval OWASP_Category="A07:2021-Identification Failures", Alert="Brute Force / Credential Stuffing" | eval last_seen = strftime(last_seen, "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S") | sort - login_attempts | table last_seen, clientip, Country, City, login_attempts, login_pages, OWASP_Category, Alert
description: Eyni IP ünvanından qısa müddətdə çoxsaylı uğursuz giriş cəhdlərini (Brute Force) aşkarlayır.
